title: Runaway/Homeless Youth Helplines - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Crisis Hotlines > Runaway/Homeless Youth Helplines 6 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BOYS TOWN NATIONAL HOTLINE YOUR LIFE YOUR VOICE HELP SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 24-hour crisis, resource, and referral line. Crisis counselors provide support for issues such as abuse, anger, anxiety, bullying, coping skills, dating and break-ups, depression, eating disorders, grief, parenting and relationship problems, self-esteem, self-injury, school, stress, suicide, and self-care. Offers a mobile app with a mood journal to track feelings in writing or emojis and get tips on how to identify triggers or deal with stressful situations. 14100 Crawford Street Boys Town, NE 68010 Eligibility: At-risk children and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 448-3000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY BASIC CENTER BEND EMERGENCY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis hotline, short and long term shelter, case management and advocacy, crisis intervention, short term counseling, and mediation services between youth and their families. 2125 NE Daggett Lane Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Runaway and at-risk youth ages 11-17 Hours: Shelter and Crisis Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Other service times may vary. Email (541) 382-0934 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINES FOR LIFE YOUTHLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis intervention line. Additionally provides support and referrals around such topics as dealing with bad test grades, running away from home, homelessness, a recent breakup, depression, anxiety, bullying, pregnancy, self-harm, or substance use disorders. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Youth ages 10-24 and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (877) 968-8491 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES STATION 7 STATION 7 SHELTER AND CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth crisis intervention services and a temporary youth shelter. Services include immediate crisis intervention and counseling, youth and family assessments, and referral assistance. Shelter services offer short-term overnight stays, group counseling, and individual case management. Individuals in crisis may also use the shelter for temporary respite while a long-term plan is developed. 931 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: -Runaway and homeless youth ages 11-20 -Youth and families in conflict Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 689-3111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides anonymous and confidential crisis intervention, information and referral, message delivery, and conference services. 4849 N Milwaukee Avenue Suite 700 Chicago, IL 60630 Eligibility: Ages 12-21 who are homeless or runaway youth and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 786-2929 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL SAFE PLACE TXT 4 HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a confidential text-for-support service for youth in crisis. This service is intended to assist with issues revolving around abuse, bullying, family problems, depression, and/or suicidal thoughts. Counselors provide support via text messages. 545 South 2nd Street Louisville, KY 40202 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 44357 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER EMERGENCY SERVICES LINES FOR LIFE YOUTHLINE LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES STATION 7 SHELTER AND CRISIS LINE
